task: Find NHL events occurring in Boston.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by searching StubHub for NHL-related events with the location filter set to Boston and determining that there were no NHL events in Boston. This is supported by the final NHL Playoffs page showing the location filter as "Boston" and the explicit message "No events near you," plus the Boston Bruins search suggestion showing "Boston Bruins Hockey • 0 events." Since finding none is a valid outcome when backed by site evidence, the task was successfully completed.
final_result_response:
I checked StubHub’s NHL Playoffs page with the location filter set to Boston.

Result: I don’t see any NHL events occurring in Boston.

StubHub shows:
- “No events near you”
- NHL Playoffs cities listed: Anaheim, Buffalo, Denver, Las Vegas, Montréal, Raleigh, Saint Paul
- Boston Bruins search result: “0 events”

Visible NHL Playoffs listings were in Denver, Anaheim, Buffalo, Saint Paul, and Las Vegas, not Boston.
action_history: Opening StubHub: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.stubhub.com/');
Searching StubHub for NHL Boston: await page.locator('e15').fill('NHL Boston');
Opening NHL Playoffs results: await page.locator('e70').click();
Setting location to Boston: await page.locator('e130').fill('Boston');
Opening NHL Playoffs category: await page.locator('e13').click();
Searching StubHub for Boston Bruins: await page.locator('e2').fill('Boston Bruins');
Searching StubHub for Boston Bruins: await page.locator('e2').press('Enter');
Searching StubHub for NHL in Boston: await page.locator('e2').fill('NHL in Boston');
Searching StubHub for NHL in Boston: await page.locator('e2').press('Enter');
Searching for Boston Bruins team page: await page.locator('e2').fill('Boston Bruins');
Opening NHL Playoffs category again: await page.locator('e2').fill('NHL Playoffs');
Clicking NHL Playoffs result: await page.locator('e137').click();
